Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPPRC2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Practitioner SEARCH;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIC 10090 ; SRCHPRC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N QRYRSLT,IX,RSLTARY,PAGING,BUFFER,SMRY,CNT,OUT,DVPORG,RECMAX,EXIT,RECFND,IEN,EXTID S (SMRY,CNT,IX,DVPCNT,EXIT,RECFND)=0,RECMAX=100,EXTID="" D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS),CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; ; Search by Id I $P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U)'="" D G:EXIT QUIT . S EXTID("SYSTEMS",1)="us-npi",EXTID("SYSTEMS",2)="IEN",EXTID("SYSTEMS",3)="http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-npi",EXTID("SYSTEMS",4)="http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien" . I '$$PRSIDENT^DVPUTLS(.EXTID) S EXIT=1 Q . S EXTID=$G(EXTID("CODE")) . ; use IEN . I $D(EXTID("CODE")),(($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN")!($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="")!($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))=EXTID("SYSTEMS",4))) D Q:EXIT . . I ($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN")!($P(EXTID,":",4)'="") I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(EXTID,"SRCHORG^DVPORG2") S EXIT=1 Q . . I +$P(EXTID,":",5)=0,$G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied practitionerId: "_EXTID_" has an invalid format.","SRCHPRC^DVPPRC2") . . I $P($G(EXTID),":",5)="",$G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Practitioner Identifier: "_EXTID_" does not have the correct format.","SRCHPRC^DVPPRC2") . . S IEN=$P($G(EXTID),":",5) D GETS^DIQ(200,IEN_",","**","","ARRAY") I $D(ARRAY)'=10 D . . . I $G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Practitioner record found for practitionerId: "_EXTID,"SRCHPRC^DVPPRC2") . . . S RECFND=1 . . I RECFND S RECFND=0 Q . . S OUT("DILST",0)=1,OUT("DILIST",2,EXTID)="",RECFND=1 . . S IEN="",DVPCNT=0 F S IEN=$O(OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)) Q:IEN="" D . . . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=EXTID ; ; Search by specific npi code I EXTID'="",'RECFND,$D(EXTID("CODE")) D G:EXIT QUIT . N FND S (EXIT,FND)=0 . ; Search by NPI . D LIST^DIC(200,,"@;10.1","I",,"","","","","","OUT") . N IX,IX2,FLD S DVPCNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(OUT("DILIST",2,IX)) Q:IX="" D . . N NPI D GETS^DIQ(200,OUT("DILIST",2,IX)_",","42*","I","NPI") . . N NPISRTD,NPIPRD S IX2="" F S IX2=$O(NPI(200.042,IX2)) Q:IX2="" D . . . I NPI("200.042",IX2,".03","I")=EXTID D UPDIX S FND=1 . I 'FND D MKOO S EXIT=1 ; ; Search by all npi codes I 'RECFND,$D(EXTID("CODE"))=0 D G:EXIT QUIT . N FND S FND=0 . D LIST^DIC(200,,"@;10.1","I",,"","","","","","OUT") . N IX,IX2,FLD S DVPCNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(OUT("DILIST",2,IX)) Q:IX="" D . . N NPI D GETS^DIQ(200,OUT("DILIST",2,IX)_",","42*","I","NPI") . . N NPISRTD,NPIPRD S IX2="" F S IX2=$O(NPI(200.042,IX2)) Q:IX2="" D Q:FND . . . D UPDIX S FND=1 ; Search by given and family I ($P($G(QUERYPAR("family")),U)'="")!($P($G(QUERYPAR("given")),U)'="") D . D LIST^DIC(200,,"@;10.1","I",,"","","","","","OUT") . N IX,FLD S DVPCNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX)) Q:IX="" D . . S NAMEIEN=OUT("DILIST","ID",IX,10.1) N NAMES D GETS^DIQ(20,NAMEIEN_",","1;2","","NAMES") I $D(NAMES) D . . . I ($P($G(QUERYPAR("family")),U)'=""),($P($G(QUERYPAR("given")),U)="") D . . . . I $$UP^XLFSTR(NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",1))[$$UP^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("family")),U)) D UPDIX . . . I ($P($G(QUERYPAR("family")),U)=""),($P($G(QUERYPAR("given")),U)'="") D . . . . I $$UP^XLFSTR(NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",2))[$$UP^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("given")),U)) D UPDIX . . . I ($P($G(QUERYPAR("family")),U)'=""),($P($G(QUERYPAR("given")),U)'="") D . . . . I $$UP^XLFSTR(NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",2))[$$UP^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("given")),U)) D . . . . . I $$UP^XLFSTR(NAMES(20,NAMEIEN_",",1))[$$UP^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("family")),U)) D UPDIX ; N PAGING S DFN="" D:+DVPCNT>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(DVPCNT,.PAGING) G:$G(PAGING("OO")) QUIT . I DVPCNT>RECMAX,$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("count")),U)="" D . . N NODE S PAGING("REND")=RECMAX,NODE=$NA(@TARGET@("results","warning","OperationOutcome","issue","severity")) . . S @NODE@("severity")="warning" . . S @NODE@("code")="too-costly" . . S @NODE@("details")="" ; Operation Outcome Codes . . S @NODE@("diagnostics")="The query returned too many records. The result will be trimmed to "_RECMAX_" records. Consider using paging." . . S @NODE@("location")="SRCHPAT^DVPFPT1" . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . N DVPORG D FHIRPRC^DVPPRC1(RSLTARY(RSLTCNT),.DVPORG,SMRY) . . M @TARGET@("results","bundle",RSLTCNT)=DVPORG D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS QUIT ; Q ; UPDIX ; S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("practitioner","",OUT("DILIST",2,IX)) Q ; MKOO ; D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No practitioner record found for practitionerId: "_EXTID_".","SRCHPRC^DVPPRC2") Q
